<!-- Keep PRs small: one example or one fix each. -->

## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes, and the motivation. -->

## Type

- [ ] New / updated visual template (`examples/`)
- [ ] New / updated application (`applications/`)
- [ ] Fix / docs / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, cookies, or real account data committed
- [ ] No build artefacts (`bin/`, `obj/`, `dist/`) — `git status` clean
- [ ] README (and screenshot, if the UI changed) updated
- [ ] For the .NET app: `dotnet build -c Release` is **0 warnings** and
      `dotnet test` is **all green** (CI runs the same)
- [ ] I agree my contribution is MIT-licensed (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
